title: The ability for Managed templates to control deletion and reordering of items
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: Jacob1 (Jacob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently when it comes to items, managed templates can only add new items to connected instances. It would be nice for there to be a setting where you can choose what a managed template controls, for example the ability for a managed template to also, delete, edit and reorder items from connected instances.

What are you trying to achieve

My use case is a board that tracks the training someone has done, and each person has their own board created from a managed template.
Since after a while trainings are updated and changed, it would be nice to be able to remove and/or edit them in the template and this be reflected in individual boards.
